ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nhs_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NHS region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the NHS region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the NHS region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., metropolitan, rural) */,
  "total_hospitals" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitals in the region */,
  "total_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds in the region */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the regional health authority */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the regional health authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reproduction_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reproduction rate entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pandemic data entry */,
  "r" REAL /* Reproduction rate (R) */,
  "lower_95" REAL /* Lower bound of 95% confidence interval for R */,
  "upper_95" REAL /* Upper bound of 95% confidence interval for R */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the reproduction rate was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., model, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reproduction_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "halving_times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each halving time entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pandemic data entry */,
  "halving_t" REAL /* Estimate of time for the number of cases to halve */,
  "halving_t_lower_95" REAL /* Lower bound of 95% confidence interval for halving time */,
  "halving_t_upper_95" REAL /* Upper bound of 95% confidence interval for halving time */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the halving time was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., model, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_halving_times_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_data" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pandemic data entry */,
  "w_min" TEXT /* Start date of the week for the data */,
  "w_max" TEXT /* End date of the week for the data */,
  "total_cases_weekly" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the region for the given week */,
  "new_cases_weekly" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported in the region for the given week */,
  "total_deaths_weekly" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the region for the given week */,
  "new_deaths_weekly" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported in the region for the given week */,
  "vaccination_rate_weekly" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated in the given week */,
  "hospitalization_rate_weekly" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been hospitalized in the given week */,
  "test_positivity_rate_weekly" REAL /* Percentage of tests that came back positive in the given week */,
  "recovery_rate_weekly" REAL /* Percentage of cases that have recovered in the given week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effective_reproduction_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effective reproduction rate entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pandemic data entry */,
  "R" REAL /* Effective reproduction rate (R_t) */,
  "R_lower_95" REAL /* Lower bound of 95% confidence interval for R_t */,
  "R_upper_95" REAL /* Upper bound of 95% confidence interval for R_t */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the effective reproduction rate was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., model, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effective_reproduction_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, public health officer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or position of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pandemic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pandemic data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly summary, trend analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pandemic data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "viz_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, chart, dashboard) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pandemic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
